title: Systems manager
description:
We are seeking an experienced System Manager to oversee the design, implementation, and operations of mission-critical systems supporting Defence sector projects. You will work closely with Solution Architects, Project Managers, and Technical Leads to ensure system reliability, security, and high-quality delivery across multiple enterprise environments.


Key Responsibilities:

  • Lead and manage all installed systems and infrastructure, ensuring availability, performance, and compliance.
  • Oversee and guide engineers and technical teams in incident resolution, troubleshooting, and technical escalations.
  • Plan and supervise installation, configuration, testing, and maintenance of operating systems and system management tools.
  • Drive system architecture improvements, operational support processes, and security hardening (CIS benchmarks).
  • Coordinate and manage relationships with vendors, partners, and internal teams to resolve complex issues.
  • Ensure enterprise-wide operational excellence across Microsoft Windows, VMware, and Red Hat platforms.
  • Oversee 24/7 operational support and participate in the monthly on-call rotation as needed.

Ideal candidate:

  • Diploma / Degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or related fields.
  • Strong experience in IT system management across diverse infrastructure environments.
  • Proactive, positive attitude with strong leadership in operations and service delivery.
  • Effective communication and stakeholder management skills.
  • Ability to start immediately or on short notice is an advantage.
  • Experience with IBM MQ, MongoDB, and VMware NSX is a strong plus.
  • Minimum 8 years of relevant experience, with proven system management responsibilities.

postedCompany.description:
Newtone services is an IT recruitment and sourcing specialist, delivering tailored talent solutions since 2013. We partner with organisations to identify, select, and onboard the right IT professionals—whether for permanent roles or contract-based project delivery.

With deep expertise across the IT landscape, we recruit for a wide range of roles, from functional business analysts to highly specialised technical architects. Our consultants bring strong IT backgrounds and years of recruitment experience, enabling them to understand complex technical requirements and match them with the right talent efficiently and accurately.

We work with leading multinational clients across banking, technology, fintech, industrial, infrastructure, and retail sectors, supporting their growth and critical digital initiatives through high-quality IT talent.
postedCompany.name: NEWTONE SERVICES PTE. LTD.
